products.name: blueWatch
products.description: When your detectors disagree, that's the alert that matters. SOC alert verification — surfaces the disagreement signal between SIEM, SOAR, and EDR tools where real attacks hide. Buyer: CISO / Director of SOC.

products.name: blueScreen
products.description: Sanctions screening that closes its own justifications. Generates regulator-ready disposition rationale on every match, drains the false-positive queue. Buyer: Director of Sanctions Compliance / OFAC Officer.

products.name: blueGuard
products.description: Show your work to the regulator, not just your decision. AML evidence packets — every SAR decision comes with the panel deliberation OCC examiners want. Buyer: Chief AML Officer / Head of Financial Crime Compliance.

products.name: blueClaims
products.description: Faster claim closure, defensible claim files. Commercial insurance adjudication acceleration with audit trails that survive litigation. Buyer: Chief Claims Officer / VP Commercial Lines Claims.

products.name: blueChart
products.description: Better appeals. Better audit trail. No autonomous denials. Health-plan utilization management decision support that strengthens human review instead of replacing it. Buyer: Chief Medical Officer / VP Clinical Operations.

products.name: isThisAScam
products.description: Multi-AI scam detection — paste a suspicious message, get red/yellow/green plus reasoning.

products.name: fixMyEmail
products.description: Rewrite difficult emails — clarity, tone, professionalism.

products.name: whatDoesMyLeaseSay
products.description: Plain-English lease summary, red flags, and questions to ask the landlord. Reading aid, not legal advice.

products.name: askLinda
products.description: One question, three frontier AI models in parallel — see consensus and divergence.

products.name: blueForge
products.description: Desktop AI development environment — verification-first, agents-as-default-action.

products.name: reviewMyContract
products.description: Contract review for freelancers and small businesses.

products.name: Linda v1 (blueFinancial vertical)
products.description: End-user terminal for verticalized AI workflows. First vertical: blueFinancial RIA operations.
